description: Google Local Services API is a programmatic interface for Local Services Ads used by Google Ads manager-account users to work with linked Local Services accounts and leads. It supports reporting endpoints on localservices.googleapis.com and related Local Services campaign workflows.
summary: localservices.googleapis.com exposes one OAuth 2.0–protected HTTP API for Google Local Services Ads reporting/management endpoints; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
